decision_summary: The critical breaches in crash rate and payment success necessitate an immediate rollback to restore stability and user trust.

key_drivers: Crash rate has surged to 5.6%, exceeding the critical threshold of 2.0%.
Payment success rate has dropped to 92.5%, below the acceptable minimum of 97.0%.
User sentiment is severely negative, with an average rating of 1.89 and 77.1% of feedback being negative.
rationale.feedback_summary: User sentiment is critically low, with significant dissatisfaction stemming from crashes and payment issues. The high volume of support tickets indicates urgent user concerns.

what_increases_confidence: Immediate rollback to restore previous stability.
Clear communication plan to address user concerns.
Engagement with users to rebuild trust post-rollback.
what_decreases_confidence: Potential for unresolved underlying issues to persist post-rollback.
Risk of further user dissatisfaction if communication is not handled well.
Accumulation of technical debt from quick fixes.

risk_register.risk: User trust erosion due to severe dissatisfaction and churn.
risk_register.mitigation: Implement a robust communication strategy to address user concerns and provide updates.

risk_register.risk: Technical debt accumulation from quick fixes.
risk_register.mitigation: Conduct a comprehensive root cause analysis and plan for long-term solutions.

risk_register.risk: Loss of market competitiveness due to user dissatisfaction.
risk_register.mitigation: Monitor competitor responses and user migration patterns closely.

action_plan.action: Initiate rollback to version 1.9.4 to restore stability.
Set up real-time monitoring on crash rates and payment success rates during the rollback.
Prepare a detailed report on user sentiment and churn metrics for leadership.

internal: Convene an urgent cross-functional team meeting to address critical bugs.
Prepare a report on current sentiment and churn metrics.
external: Issue a public acknowledgment of the issues and commitment to resolving them.
Provide a timeline for fixes and a dedicated support channel for affected users.
